title: Michigan Kid
writer: Roy Chanslor, Rex Beach, Robert Presnell Sr.
actors: Jon Hall, Victor McLaglen, Rita Johnson
plot: Jim Rowan, after his discharge from the U.S. Calvary at the end of the Sioux Wars, seeks peace and security on an Arizona cattle ranch. But his arrival coincides with an outbreak of lawlessness. He calls in three ex-soldier buddie...
